//: Copy this into your project's .claude/settings.json (or your org's managed settings) to auto-distribute the VKS Assistant skills to your team. When a teammate trusts the repo, Claude Code prompts them to add the marketplace and install the plugin. The key 'greennode' must match the 'name' field in vks-skills' marketplace.json; the repo path stays vngcloud/vks-skills (where it is hosted).
